mapper.sql: vote_id AS voteId, trip_id AS tripId, creator_user_id AS creatorUserId, title, status, started_at AS startedAt, ended_at AS endedAt
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TRIP t LEFT JOIN TRIP_MEMBER tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.invite_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND tm.member_role = 'EDITOR' WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND (t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR tm.trip_member_id IS NOT NULL) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VOTE (trip_id, creator_user_id, title, status, started_at) VALUES (#{vote.tripId}, #{vote.creatorUserId}, #{vote.title}, 'OPEN', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO VOTE_OPTION (vote_id, place_id, option_title, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{option.voteId}, #{option.placeId}, #{option.optionTitle}, #{option.description}, #{option.sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM VOTE WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'OPEN' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, started_at DESC, vote_id DESC

SELECT vo.vote_option_id AS voteOptionId, vo.vote_id AS voteId, vo.place_id AS placeId, vo.option_title AS optionTitle, vo.description, vo.sort_order AS sortOrder, COUNT(vb.vote_ballot_id) AS voteCount FROM VOTE_OPTION vo LEFT JOIN VOTE_BALLOT vb ON vb.vote_option_id = vo.vote_option_id WHERE vo.vote_id = #{voteId} GROUP BY vo.vote_option_id, vo.vote_id, vo.place_id, vo.option_title, vo.description, vo.sort_order ORDER BY vo.sort_order ASC, vo.vote_option_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VOTE_BALLOT (vote_id, vote_option_id, user_id, voted_at) VALUES (#{voteId}, #{voteOptionId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE vote_option_id = VALUES(vote_option_id), voted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
